e2_sentence: I heard him reciting the  poetic verses composed by Ibn Rawaha while he was carrying the earth, "O  Allah

e1_sentence: When it was the day of Al-Ahzab (i.e. the clans) and Allah's Apostle dug the  trench, I saw him carrying earth out of the trench till dust made the skin of  his abdomen out of my sight and he was a hairy man
